Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to generate an event log from the given tables. The case ID is order_id. We need to produce one row per event. The events are: Order Created from Orders, Items Picked from Order Lines, Order Dispatched and Order Arrived from Delivery, Invoice Issued from Invoice, Payment Received from Payments.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Items Picked, since picking dates differ within the same order, it might make sense to have individual Item Picked events for each line item, each with its own timestamp, item, quantity, picker. That would be meaningful. So well produce one event per order line, activity Item Picked.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Delivery events: Order Dispatched with timestamp delivery_dispatch_date, Order Arrived with delivery_arrival_date. Resource carrier_id. Invoice Issued with invoice_issue_date, resource billing_person_id. Payment Received with payment_date.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order creation: one event per order, Order Created, timestamp order_date, resource sales_person_id. Attributes: customer_id, customer_type, order_priority.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Assumptions: For each item picking, well treat it as a separate event, as picking dates differ and pickers differ. For deliveries with multiple shipments, separate dispatch and arrival events per delivery. Ensure chronological order.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Resource column: use the actual resource name from Resources table if possible. For Order Created: sales person name. For Item Picked: warehouse staff name. For Dispatch/Arrival: carrier name. For Invoice Issued: billing clerk name. For payment, leave blank.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Produce table sorted by timestamp ascending. Columns: Case ID, Activity, Timestamp, Resource, Customer ID, Customer Type, Order Priority, Item ID, Quantity, Delivery ID, Carrier, Delivery Note, Invoice ID, Invoice Amount, Billing Person, Payment ID, Payment Method, Payment Reference.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: List all events per case, check timelines like picking before dispatch. Note missing data for order 1004: only creation and item picked, no delivery, invoice, payment. Double-check all order line items, deliveries, invoices, payments. Good.
